summary: Comprehensive testing of Electrophysiology ABF Analysis App (iteration 3). All requested features verified working. Fixed a critical bug with SelectItem empty string value that was crashing the app.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/ returns 'NeuroVoltage API' message
✅ Backend /api/compute-metrics accepts filter_lower_pct and filter_upper_pct parameters
✅ Backend /api/compute-metrics returns default 50-200% filter settings
✅ Backend /api/compute-metrics accepts custom strict filter (70-150%)
✅ Backend /api/compute-metrics accepts custom loose filter (30-250%)
✅ Backend /api/hrv-analysis accepts baseline_hrv_start, baseline_hrv_end, baseline_bf_start, baseline_bf_end
✅ Backend /api/hrv-analysis returns baseline metrics in response
✅ Backend /api/light-response returns n_beats, avg_bf, avg_nn, nn_70 per stim
✅ Backend /api/light-detect with decreasing intervals working
✅ Backend /api/light-hrv computation working
✅ Backend /api/per-minute-metrics returns proper per-minute metrics
✅ Backend exports (CSV, XLSX, PDF) with recording_name and drug_used fields working
✅ Frontend file upload page loads correctly with NeuroVoltage branding
✅ Frontend recording name input field is present and functional
✅ Frontend drug selection dropdown is present (None, Isoproterenol, Carbachol, Propranolol, Atropine, Other)
✅ Frontend DetectionPanel has artifact filter sliders (lowerPct: 50%, upperPct: 200%)
✅ Frontend filter presets (Default, Strict, Loose) badges present
✅ Frontend LightPanel has enable/disable toggle
✅ Frontend LightPanel shows BPM chart with pulse regions
✅ Frontend Light Stim configuration: start time, pulse duration, intervals, pulses count
✅ Frontend Light Response Metrics table with Beats/BF/NN/NN₇₀ columns
✅ Frontend TraceViewer edit mode button present for beat editing
✅ Frontend Analysis tab shows filtered BF and NN charts
✅ Frontend Analysis tab HRV section with configurable baseline parameters
✅ Frontend Per-Minute Metrics table with SDNN₇₀/RMSSD₇₀/pNN50₇₀ columns (3-min window info)

fixed_issues.issue: SelectItem value='' for drug 'None' causing React error and app crash
fixed_issues.fix: Changed empty string value to 'none' and updated related logic to handle 'none' as no drug

seed_data_creation: Used pyabf sample file from GitHub (sample2.abf) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features are working. The app uploads ABF files, detects beats, validates them with configurable artifact filter (50-200% default), computes HRV with baseline metrics, handles light stimulation analysis with enable/disable toggle and new metrics (n_beats, avg_bf, avg_nn, nn_70), and exports to CSV/XLSX/PDF with recording name and drug fields. Fixed a critical bug where SelectItem with empty value was crashing the app.

features_verified.artifact_filter: Working - configurable 50-200% of local median with UI sliders and presets
features_verified.baseline_metrics: Working - HRV 0-3min and BF 1-2min configurable in AnalysisPanel
features_verified.recording_name: Working - Input field in header bar
features_verified.drug_used: Working - Dropdown with preset options (None, Isoproterenol, Carbachol, Propranolol, Atropine, Other)
features_verified.light_response_metrics: Working - New columns: Beats, BF (bpm), NN (ms), NN₇₀ (ms)
features_verified.hrv_columns: Working - SDNN₇₀, RMSSD₇₀, pNN50₇₀ with 3-min window info tooltips
features_verified.edit_beats: Present - Edit Beats button available in TraceViewer
